ab: Ci Kacaw ku ngangan nu maku.
Ci Using ku ngangan ni ama nu maku.
Ci Panay ku ngangan ni ina nu maku.
Muktep tu ku mihcaan nu maku i anini a mihca.
Sikaka kaku tu vavainay cacay, ci Kulas han cira, savaw tu cacay ku mihcaan nira i anini a mihca.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Kulas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kulas, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.
Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: Maulah kaku a midanguy, i pipantangan maruyaruy tu ku luma’ niyam a midanguy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: Maulah kaku a sicavay tu valuhay a cavay, malecavay tu kami a remadiw, a midanguy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
